T0037.title: Loan Processing
T0037.definition: Refers to the operational documents and records generated throughout the credit lifecycle, including applications, approvals, disbursements, and repayments. In underground parlance, it also denotes a practitioner's demonstrated ability to handle loan processing, as in phrases like "full-cycle handling" or "high-capability processing."

T0037.usageExample: 我这边实力操单，无视黑白户，只要没法院执行就能过，点位面谈。
